claim_story: Sideswiped by another car while merging onto 5th Street.
Attempted break-in in the the airport parking lot damaged the car.
Backed into a concrete pillar in the the office parking garage.
Rear-ended at a red light on 5th Street.
Vandalized in the the grocery store lot -- panels keyed and glass broken.
Vandalized in the downtown lot -- panels keyed and glass broken.
A tree branch fell on the car during a windstorm at the grocery store.
A deer ran into the car at dusk on 5th Street.
Sideswiped by another car while merging onto Elm Street.
Rear-ended at a red light on Route 9.
Head-on collision totaled the entire front of the car -- hood, both fenders, and the bumper all need full replacement.
A rock kicked up on the highway cracked and completely shattered my windshield.
Minor shopping-cart ding on the rear door, nothing else.
Rear-ended at a stoplight by another vehicle that failed to brake.
